_comment: Raven Enterprise MCP — generated by install-enterprise.sh. Do not edit manually. Deploy to system Claude Code path (see below), then every developer on this machine gets Raven MCP auto-loaded with zero dev action.
_setup: Run: sudo bash install-enterprise.sh — this file is then generated with the correct path for your machine.

raven._note: Path set by install-enterprise.sh. If deploying manually, set this to wherever Raven is installed on your machine.
